{{Quote|He's loose!|A [[Project Phlutdroid/Legends|Project Phlutdroid]] technician, speaking of [[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88A]]|<ref name="Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88">{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}}</ref>}}
The '''Holowan Massacre''' or '''Holowan Disaster''' took place sometime before [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Halowan]]. It involved the [[Death/Legends|death]] of dozens of [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] and guards at the [[Holowan Laboratories (facility)|Holowan Laboratories]] at the hands of the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88]]. When he was activated, he executed his creators, programmed and activated his counterparts, and together with [[IG-72]], went through the facility, killing all the personnel. Once all of the employees they could detect were dead, they escaped the planet, and headed for [[Mechis III/Legends|Mechis III]], beginning their [[Droid Revolution|plans]] for [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
